title: Luminous Grain
description: Illustration numérique minimaliste définie par des dégradés intenses et lumineux sur un vide sombre. Les formes émergent grâce à un éclairage rasant et des silhouettes nettes, fortement texturées par un bruit numérique uniforme.
description_en: Minimalist digital illustration defined by intense, luminous gradients against pure dark voids. Forms emerge through stark rim lighting and sharp silhouettes, heavily textured with uniform digital noise.
description_fr: Illustration numérique minimaliste définie par des dégradés intenses et lumineux sur un vide sombre. Les formes émergent grâce à un éclairage rasant et des silhouettes nettes, fortement texturées par un bruit numérique uniforme.
prompt: Minimalist digital illustration characterized by heavy, uniform monochromatic film grain and smooth vector-like gradients. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. Render the scene using extreme stark chiaroscuro, where elements emerge dramatically from a pure, flat {{secondary_color}} dark void. Illumination is provided by a striking, directional gradient key light that sweeps across the forms, transitioning seamlessly from a brilliant {{primary_color}} to a vivid {{accent_color}}. Core shadows are completely crushed and devoid of detail, blending their lost edges flawlessly into the negative space. There is absolutely no line work or contour drawing; spatial volume and depth are defined exclusively by crisp, razor-sharp silhouette edge contrast where the luminous gradient strikes the surfaces. The composition relies heavily on negative space and stark graphic simplicity. A dense, uniform layer of digital noise blankets the entire artwork, transforming the otherwise pristine digital gradients into a tactile, matte, atmospheric texture. Ethereal, mysterious, high-contrast cyber-noir aesthetic., minimalist digital art, heavy film grain, luminous gradient, stark chiaroscuro, sharp silhouette, lost edges, negative space, {{primary_color}} to {{accent_color}} transition, noise texture, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The scene is composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface, allowing intentional overflow where parts of the {{subject}} can extend beyond the visible frame. Render the scene using extreme stark chiaroscuro, where elements emerge dramatically from deep {{secondary_color}} shadows. Illumination is provided by a striking, directional gradient key light that sweeps across the forms, transitioning seamlessly from a brilliant {{primary_color}} to a vivid {{accent_color}}. Core shadows are completely crushed and devoid of detail, blending their lost edges flawlessly into the {{background_color}} backdrop. There is absolutely no line work or contour drawing; spatial volume and depth are defined exclusively by crisp, razor-sharp silhouette edge contrast where the luminous gradient strikes the surfaces. The composition relies heavily on stark graphic simplicity against the {{background_color}}. A dense, uniform layer of digital noise blankets the artwork, transforming the pristine digital gradients into a tactile, matte texture. Ethereal, mysterious, high-contrast cyber-noir aesthetic., minimalist digital art, heavy film grain, luminous gradient, stark chiaroscuro, sharp silhouette, lost edges, negative space, {{primary_color}} to {{accent_color}} transition, noise texture
background_prompt: A pure, minimalist background environment defined by a stark {{secondary_color}} void. A soft, sweeping, luminous atmospheric gradient of {{primary_color}} and {{accent_color}} gently illuminates the lower hemisphere of the space, fading completely into deep shadow above. The entire backdrop is heavily textured with dense, uniform monochromatic digital noise, creating a tactile, matte, atmospheric depth without any distinct objects or boundaries.
background_prompt_removebg: A pure, minimalist background environment defined by a stark {{secondary_color}} void. A soft, sweeping, luminous atmospheric gradient of {{primary_color}} and {{accent_color}} gently illuminates the lower hemisphere of the space, fading completely into deep shadow above. The entire scene is heavily textured with dense, uniform monochromatic digital noise. A crisp, geometric framing element of {{primary_color}} sits in the foreground, creating depth before transitioning smoothly into the flat {{background_color}} surface.
